ideation: This sequence shows the robot putting on a cap.  The action starts with arms at the sides, then moves to bringing the cap (assumed to be held in both hands initially) up to the head, then settling the cap onto the head, and finally returning to a relaxed posture.  The movement is not overly complex, reflecting a simple action. The robot does not have hands, so the cap is conceptually held near the hands' locations.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready to receive the cap
both arms lift the cap towards the head
the cap settles gently onto the head
arms return to rest at the sides
